transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Path Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Reyes, born March 4th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see your last fill was about a month ago at Cedar Grove Pharmacy. Would you like it sent there again?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, that's the one, on Willow Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Your prescription still has two refills remaining, so I'll send the request to Cedar Grove Pharmacy now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, how long until it's ready?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It usually takes about two hours. They'll text you when it's ready for pickup.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Daniel. Anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Have a good day.
